textByHash.c5464fed189f51f0a9f183cd4f88fec38bdbc3ba: Hello. Interested in honing your skills?
textByHash.af143579882f8572707258b588a4bb578d29ac85: That's all the training I can give you. I hope you find it useful.
textByHash.ae96cd3e9d373144ee8a70aa6107a39c1fc1ae78: I'll be here if you change your mind.
textByHash.28d080a2d2da84876adb0fdb5992d28019bae813: Hello again. I'm afraid I've given you all the training I can.
